title: astragalus guatemalensis
intro: Astragalus guatemalensis, a perennial legume plant native to Central America, is a member of the Fabaceae family and is commonly known as Guatemalan milkvetch. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties, and is believed to have immunomodulatory effects. Astragalus guatemalensis is thought to have various health benefits, including reducing stress, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine.
